title: teucrium cubense subsp. depressum
intro: Teucrium cubense subsp. depressum is a plant species that belongs to the genus Teucrium, commonly known as germander. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. In herbal preparations, Teucrium cubense subsp. depressum can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that are taken orally to reap its benefits.
